sigWerErrors.reason: 'quinientos' (five hundred) changes the number being referenced from 'cincuenta y cinco' (fifty-five) to 'quinientos cincuenta y dos' (five hundred fifty-two), which significantly alters the meaning of the sentence.
Omitting 'cinco' (five) changes the number from 'cincuenta y cinco' (fifty-five) to 'cincuenta y dos' (fifty-two), which is a significant change in meaning.
